noPaymentMethodsAction: No payment methods found. Please add a card to your account.
processingPayment: Payment is being processed. Please do not leave this page.
failedToLoadBalance: Unable to load your balance. Please try again later.
unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
amountExceedsBalance: Amount cannot exceed outstanding balance of {{amount}}.
enterValidAmountGreaterThanZero: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
paymentStillProcessing: Payment submitted and is still processing.
errorCurrencyMismatch: The payment currency doesn't match the order currency. Please contact support.
errorCardDeclined: Payment could not be completed. The card may have been declined.
errorNoMatchingCard: The selected card is not available for this order.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong with this payment. Please try again.
overallPaymentError: Some payments could not be completed. See details below.
